idea-plugin.name: AutoTranslate Strings
idea-plugin.description:
Auto Translate Strings for Android Studio.

A powerful plugin that helps Android developers automatically translate strings.xml files into multiple languages with just one click.


Features:

  • Right-click on strings.xml to auto-translate.
  • Supports multiple languages (ja, ko, zh, es, fr, etc.).
  • Automatically handles special character escaping for Android (\', \", \n).

action.description: Tự động dịch file strings.xml sang các ngôn ngữ khác
